basic_details.job_title: ICFRE-TFRI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for JRF, Project Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: ICFRE Tropical Forest Research Institute (ICFRE-TFRI) JRF, Project Assistant and More Notification 2026 has been released for the recruitment of various project-based positions at ICFRE-TFRI. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the ICFRE-TFRI Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation is relaxable up to 5 years in the case of candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes/Scheduled Tribes, Women, Divyangjan and OBC applicants.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph. D., Post Graduation, Graduation in relevant fields
qualification.details: Research Associate-1: Ph. D. or First class post graduation in Forestry / Agriculture/ Biotechnology/Life Sciences/Botany with 03 years research experience in Tree Improvement / Biotechnology / Forestry/Forest Genetics Resource Conservation. Junior Project Fellow: 1st class M.Sc. in Forestry/ Agriculture/ Botany/Environment Science/Biotechnology. Project Assistant: 1st class B.Sc. in Forestry/ Agriculture/Biological Science. Junior Research Fellow: 1st class M.Sc. in Forestry/ Agriculture/Biotechnology/Botany/ Biochemistry/Chemistry. Junior Project Fellow: 1st class M.Sc. in Natural or Marine Sciences/ Ecology/Environmental Sciences/Ecology and Environmental Sciences/Marine Biology/Marine Sciences. Junior Project Fellow: 1st class M.Sc. in Plant Biotechnology/Forest Biotechnology/ Genetics/Plant Breeding/Plant Science/Life Sciences. Project Assistant: 1st class B.Sc. in Botany/Life Sciences/Forestry.

salary_details.details: Research Associate-1: Rs. 58,000/- fixed (without HRA) Junior Project Fellow: Rs. 24,000/- fixed (without HRA) Project Assistant: Rs. 22,000/- fixed (without HRA) Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 20,000/- fixed (without HRA)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICFRE-TFRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ICFRE-TFRI Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 19 June 2026. Candidates should report on this date for registration and the interview process.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICFRE-TFRI?
faq.answer: ICFRE-TFRI has announced a total of 8 vacancies for the posts of Research Associate-1, Junior Research Fellow, Junior Project Fellow, and Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST, Women, Divyangjan, and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant post, candidates need to have a 1st class B.Sc. in Forestry/ Agriculture/Biological Science or a 1st class B.Sc. in Botany/Life Sciences/Forestry.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ICFRE-TFRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate-1 position will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 58,000/- per month, excluding House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for ICFRE-TFRI Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ICFRE Tropical Forest Research Institute (ICFRE-TFRI) office in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any desirable qualifications mentioned for the Junior Project Fellow posts?
faq.answer: Yes, desirable qualifications vary by specific Junior Project Fellow post, including working knowledge of computers, experience in GIS and Remote Sensing, or experience in molecular marker work.
